---
title: "🗓️ Unit 11 -  Spatial Random Forests"
---

RF effectiveness in environmental data analysis has led to the development of spatial RF variants, which adapt RF to consider spatial dependency in the data. In this week, we will dive into spatial RFs.


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture  

[Random forests with spatial proxies for environmental modelling](https://gmd.copernicus.org/articles/17/6007/2024/)

## Practical exercise

- Download code and data used in Milá et al. (2024) that is available [here](https://zenodo.org/records/11383045)

## Recommended reading

[An assessment of spatial random forests for environmental mapping](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S136481522500310X)


## ✍️ Coursework

🚧   
Keep doing the exercises for your *Informe No. 2*.
🚧
